name: Graham Crackers
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6 dozen
DIRECTIONS: Cream the shortening and sugars together until fluffy. Add vanilla.
Sift the flour, then add salt, soda, and baking powder to the flour mixture. Sift again.
Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients with milk into the shortening mixture. Mix thoroughly after each addition. Chill dough in the refrigerator overnight.
In the morning, turn out onto a floured board and roll as thin as possible. Cut into squares or desired shapes. Place 1 inch apart on a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F until crisp and golden brown.
